scripts.server: node scripts/apply-fast-naver-settings.mjs && node scripts/apply-card-ui.mjs && vite build && node server.js
scripts.build: node scripts/apply-fast-naver-settings.mjs && node scripts/apply-card-ui.mjs && vite build
scripts.build:static: npm run snapshot && npm run build
scripts.build:pages: npm run snapshot && npm run build
